e._type===ue.SCATTER||e._type===ue.BUBBLE||e._type===ue.BUBBLE3D?n+="<c:valAx>":n+="<c:"+(e.catLabelFormatCode?"dateAx":"catAx")+">",n+='  <c:axId val="'+t+'"/>',n+="  <c:scaling>",n+='<c:orientation val="'+(e.catAxisOrientation||(e.barDir==="col","minMax"))+'"/>',(e.catAxisMaxVal||e.catAxisMaxVal===0)&&(n+=`<c:max val="${e.catAxisMaxVal}"/>`),(e.catAxisMinVal||e.catAxisMinVal===0)&&(n+=`<c:min val="${e.catAxisMinVal}"/>`),n+="</c:scaling>",n+='  <c:delete val="'+(e.catAxisHidden?"1":"0")+'"/>',n+='  <c:axPos val="'+(e.barDir==="col"?"b":"l")+'"/>',n+=e.catGridLine.style!=="none"?zc(e.catGridLine):"",e.showCatAxisTitle&&(n+=bs({color:e.catAxisTitleColor,fontFace:e.catAxisTitleFontFace,fontSize:e.catAxisTitleFontSize,titleRotate:e.catAxisTitleRotate,title:e.catAxisTitle||"Axis Title"})),e._type===ue.SCATTER||e._type===ue.BUBBLE||e._type===ue.BUBBLE3D?n+='  <c:numFmt formatCode="'+(e.valAxisLabelFormatCode?De(e.valAxisLabelFormatCode):"General")+'" sourceLinked="1"/>':n+=' val="nextTo"/>'):(n+='  <c:majorTickMark val="'+(e.catAxisMajorTickMark||"out")+'"/>',n+='  <c:minorTickMark val="'+(e.catAxisMinorTickMark||"none")+'"/>',n+='  <c:tickLblPos val="'+(e.catAxisLabelPos||(e.barDir==="col"?"low":"nextTo"))+'"/>'),n+="  <c:spPr>",n+=`    <a:ln w="${e.catAxisLineSize?Ee(e.catAxisLineSize):Qo}" cap="flat">`,n+=e.catAxisLineShow?"<a:solidFill>"+Xe(e.catAxisLineColor||ba.color)+"</a:solidFill>":"<a:noFill/>",n+='      <a:prstDash val="'+(e.catAxisLineStyle||"solid")+'"/>',n+=" Tx(e){return`<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
		<p:sldLayout xmlns:a="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main" xmlns:r="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships" xmlns:p="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/presentationml/2006/main" preserve="1">
		${Wc(e)}
		<p:clrMapOvr><a:masterClrMapping/></p:clrMapOvr></p:sldLayout>`}function Lx(e,t){const r=t.map((a,o)=>`<p:sldLayoutId id="${Yw+o}" r:id="rId${e._rels.length+o+1}"/>`);let n='<?xml version="1.0" </p:otherStyle></p:txStyles>',n+="</p:sldMaster>",n}function Dx(e,t){return qc(t[e-1],[{target:"../slideMasters/slideMaster1.xml",type:"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/slideMaster"}])}function Px(e,t,r){return qc(e[r-1],[{target:`../slideLayouts/slideLayout${Ix(e,t,r)}.xml`,type:"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/slideLayout"},{target:`../notesSlides/notesSlide${r}.xml`,type:"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/notesSlide"}])}function Nx(e){return`<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
		<Relationships xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships">
			<Relationship Id="rId1" Type="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/notesMaster" Target="../notesMasters/notesMaster1.xml"/>

Uk(e){const t=xs({nonce:ce()});return ie(()=>e?.value||t.nonce?.value)}function bu(e,t="hex"){switch(t){case"hex":return Wk(e);case"rgb":return qk(e);case"hsl":return Vk(e);case"hsb":return $k(e);default:throw new Error(`Unknown format: ${t}`)}}function Wk(e){const t=e.space==="rgb"?e:_n(e),r=n=>Math.round(n).toString(16).padStart(2,"0");if(t.alpha<1){const n=Math.round(t.alpha*255).toString(16).padStart(2,"0");return`#${r(t.r)}${r(t.g)}${r(t.b)}${n}`}return`#${r(t.r)}${r(t.g)}${r(t.b)}`}function qk(e){const t=e.space==="rgb"?e:_n(e),{r,g:n,b:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`rgba(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}, ${Math.round(a)}, ${o})`:`rgb(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}, ${Math.round(a)})`}function Vk(e){const t=e.space==="hsl"?e:fo(e),{h:r,s:n,l:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`hsla(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%, ${o})`:`hsl(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%)`}function $k(e){const t=e.space==="hsb"?e:Os(e),{h:r,s:n,b:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`hsba(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%, ${o})`:`hsb(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%)`}function _n(e){if(e.space==="rgb")return e;if(e.space==="hsl")return Xk(e);if(e.space==="hsb")return jk(e);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${e.space}`)}function fo(e){return e.space==="hsl"?e:Gk(_n(e))}function Os(e){return e.space==="hsb"?e:Hk(_n(e))}function Gk(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n);let i=0,c=0;const u=(a+o)/2;if(a!==o){const s=a-o;switch(c=u>.5?s/(2-a-o):s/(a+o),a){case t:i=(r-n)/s+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:i=(n-t)/s+2;break;case n:i=(t-r)/s+4;break}i/=6}return{space:"hsl",h:i*360,s:c*100,l:u*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function Xk(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.l/100;let a,o,i;if(r===0)a=o=i=n;else{const c=(l,d,f)=>(f<0&&(f+=1),f>1&&(f-=1),f<.16666666666666666?l+(d-l)*6*f:f<.5?d:f<.6666666666666666?l+(d-l)*(.6666666666666666-f)*6:l),u=n<.5?n*(1+r):n+r-n*r,s=2*n-u;a=c(s,u,t+1/3),o=c(s,u,t),i=c(s,u,t-1/3)}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function Hk(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n),i=a-o;let c=0;const u=a===0?0:i/a,s=a;if(a!==o){switch(a){case t:c=(r-n)/i+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:c=(n-t)/i+2;break;case n:c=(t-r)/i+4;break}c/=6}return{space:"hsb",h:c*360,s:u*100,b:s*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function jk(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.b/100;let a=0,o=0,i=0;const c=Math.floor(t*6),u=t*6-c,s=n*(1-r),l=n*(1-u*r),d=n*(1-(1-u)*r);switch(c%6){case 0:a=n,o=d,i=s;break;case 1:a=l,o=n,i=s;break;case 2:a=s,o=n,i=d;break;case 3:a=s,o=l,i=n;break;case 4:a=d,o=s,i=n;break;case 5:a=n,o=s,i=l;break}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function li(e){switch(e){case"hue":return{min:0,max:360,step:1};case"saturation":case"lightness":case"brightness":case"alpha":return{min:0,max:100,step:1};case"red":case"green":case"blue":return{min:0,max:255,step:1};default:throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${e}`)}}function ci(e,t){switch(t){case"red":return e.space==="rgb"?e.r:_n(e).r;case"green":return e.space==="rgb"?e.g:_n(e).g;case"blue":return e.space==="rgb"?e.b:_n(e).b;case"hue":return e.space==="hsl"?e.h:fo(e).h;case"saturation":return e.space==="hsl"||e.space==="hsb"?e.s:fo(e).s;case"lightness":return e.space==="hsl"?e.l:fo(e).l;case"brightness":return e.space==="hsb"?e.b:Os(e).b;case"alpha":return e.alpha*100;default:throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${t}`)}}function Ea(e,t,r){const n=li(t),a=Math.max(n.min,Math.min(n.max,r));if(t==="alpha")return{...e,alpha:a/100};if(t==="red"||t==="green"||t==="blue"){const i={..._n(e),[t==="red"?"r":t==="green"?"g":"b"]:a};return Qk(i,e.space)}if(t==="hue"||t==="lightness"){const i={...fo(e),[t==="hue"?"h":"l"]:a};return ng(i,e.space)}if(t==="saturation"){if(e.space==="hsb"){const u={...Os(e),s:a};return ag(u,e.space)}const i={...fo(e),s:a};return ng(i,e.space)}if(t==="brightness"){const i={...Os(e),b:a};return ag(i,e.space)}throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${t}`)}function Qk(e,t){if(t==="rgb")return e;if(t==="hsl")return og(e);if(t==="hsb")return ig(e);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function ng(e,t){if(t==="hsl")return e;const r=Yk(e);if(t==="rgb")return r;if(t==="hsb")return ig(r);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function ag(e,t){if(t==="hsb")return e;const r=Kk(e);if(t==="rgb")return r;if(t==="hsl")return og(r);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function og(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n);let i=0,c=0;const u=(a+o)/2;if(a!==o){const s=a-o;switch(c=u>.5?s/(2-a-o):s/(a+o),a){case t:i=(r-n)/s+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:i=(n-t)/s+2;break;case n:i=(t-r)/s+4;break}i/=6}return{space:"hsl",h:i*360,s:c*100,l:u*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function Yk(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.l/100;let a,o,i;if(r===0)a=o=i=n;else{const c=(l,d,f)=>(f<0&&(f+=1),f>1&&(f-=1),f<.16666666666666666?l+(d-l)*6*f:f<.5?d:f<.6666666666666666?l+(d-l)*(.6666666666666666-f)*6:l),u=n<.5?n*(1+r):n+r-n*r,s=2*n-u;a=c(s,u,t+1/3),o=c(s,u,t),i=c(s,u,t-1/3)}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function ig(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n),i=a-o;let c=0;const u=a===0?0:i/a,s=a;if(a!==o){switch(a){case t:c=(r-n)/i+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:c=(n-t)/i+2;break;case n:c=(t-r)/i+4;break}c/=6}return{space:"hsb",h:c*360,s:u*100,b:s*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function Kk(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.b/100;let a=0,o=0,i=0;const c=Math.floor(t*6),u=t*6-c,s=n*(1-r),l=n*(1-u*r),d=n*(1-(1-u)*r);switch(c%6){case 0:a=n,o=d,i=s;break;case 1:a=l,o=n,i=s;break;case 2:a=s,o=n,i=d;break;case 3:a=s,o=l,i=n;break;case 4:a=d,o=s,i=n;break;case 5:a=n,o=s,i=l;break}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function Ms(e){const t=e.trim().toLowerCase();if(t.startsWith("#"))return Jk(t);if(t.startsWith("rgb"))return Zk(t);if(t.startsWith("hsl"))return e2(t);if(t.startsWith("hsb")||t.startsWith("hsv"))return t2(t);throw new Error(`Unable to parse color: ${e}`)}function Jk(e){let t=e.slice(1);if(!/^[0-9A-F]{3}$/i.test(t)&&!/^[0-9A-F]{6}$/i.test(t)&&!/^[0-9A-F]{8}$/i.test(t))throw new Error(`Invalid hex color: ${e}. Expected format: #RGB, #RRGGBB, or #RRGGBBAA`);if(t.length===3&&(t=t.split("").map(r=>r+r).join("")),t.length===6){const r=parseInt(t,16);return{space:"rgb",r:r>>16&255,g:r>>8&255,b:r&255,alpha:1}}if(t.length===8){const r=parseInt(t,16);return{space:"rgb",r:r>>24&255,g:r>>16&255,b:r>>8&255,alpha:(r&255)/255}}throw new Error(`Invalid hex color: ${e}`)}function Zk(e){const t=e.match(/rgba?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid RGB color: ${e}`);return{space:"rgb",r:parseFloat(t[1]),g:parseFloat(t[2]),b:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function e2(e){const t=e.match(/hsla?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid HSL color: ${e}`);return{space:"hsl",h:parseFloat(t[1]),s:parseFloat(t[2]),l:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function t2(e){const t=e.match(/hsb[av]?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%?\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%?\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid HSB color: ${e}`);return{space:"hsb",h:parseFloat(t[1]),s:parseFloat(t[2]),b:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function r2(e){return typeof e=="string"?Ms(e):e}function n2(e){try{return Ms(e),!0}catch{return!1}}const[a2,o2]=Jt("ColorFieldRoot");var J(){if(i.value||c.value)return;const X=P();if(o.value){const $=ci(m.value,o.value);m.value=Ea(m.value,o.value,$+X),v.value=b(m.value)}else I(X)}function S(){if(i.value||c.value)return;const c(){r.value=!0}function u(d){r.value&&t.handleWheel(d)}function
